empty_state.title: News index is not wired in this build
empty_state.body: When the governed news collection and `/news/` routes from epic E8 ship, this column will list recent items here. The static build does not invent articles or URLs.

stub_state.title: Events calendar is not published yet
stub_state.body: The events collection and calendar routes from epic E9 are not merged. This space stays explicit until editorial and engineering wire the events vertical.
